programmes.show_description: DNA Detectives solve a murder of a great-grandma in Utah. S5, Ep3
Forensic investigative genetic genealogy solves the 1987 double murder of a young couple in Wisconsin. S5, Ep4
Alex and Maggie Murdaugh lived a lavish lifestyle, at their sprawling country estate in Moselle. In 2011, that dynasty would begin to crumble. S1, Ep2
When thunder strikes in Ohio, a mother of five is tragically murdered. Witnesses are not sure whether the loud booming sound they heard was the deadly gunshot. S3, Ep6
In 2018, 85-year-old Rosina Coleman was found dead at her Romford home by a man who presented himself as a concerned witness, but DC Claire Watts had suspicions. S2, Ep9
A flight over the Dorset coast becomes a terrifying ordeal when a small plane loses power. S6, Ep6/20
An eight-year-old boy has a freak accident on his scooter. S6, Ep7/20
A 79-year-old celebrates his birthday with a skydive, but his parachute fails to open. S6, Ep8/20
A dad fights for his life when, what appeared to be a sore throat, becomes sepsis. S6, Ep10/20
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
Ex-lovers fight over the alleged abuse of a beloved cat that was long overdue for a trip to the vet. S21, Ep255
After a man's jaw is allegedly broken during a fight at a party, he sues for pain and suffering; the host claims he was drunk, belligerent and aggressive. S21, Ep256
A woman sues a dog breeder for return of money she paid for a puppy, vet bills, travel costs and alleged fraud. S21, Ep257
A man who owns and manages 44 properties is sued by a tenant for the return of her deposit after he failed to show up for a housing inspection. S21, Ep258
The Judge orders a woman to hand over her dog to its co-parent in a contentious custody fight involving dead puppies and alleged emergency neutering. S24, Ep153
An RV owner is accused of messing up the festival camp vibe by refusing to pay for his girlfriend's camping fees. S24, Ep154
A man accuses a costume designer of delivering a shoddy product; the designer sues for slander and claims he received death threats. S24, Ep155
An impatient mother causes her son to be arrested and spend nine days in jail when she reports his work vehicle as stolen. S24, Ep156
While away at military training, a woman claims the father of her child bought a home with her money but neglected to put her name on the title. S18, Ep215
A woman is accused of driving erratically because of her sick child; a driver, who rear-ends her, says she slammed on the brakes and just wanted money. S18, Ep216
Divorcing parents of a toddler fight over a smashed truck after a history of arrest, assault and sibling rivalry. S18, Ep217
An American living in Denmark sues her estranged daughter for the balance of a loan; her daughter claims she was given to foster care as a child. S22, Ep30
Car values from Byrd's Blue Book seal the fate of a used car salesman who claims a buyer took advantage of him. S22, Ep31
After making a $10,000 down payment on a home in her cousin's name, a woman expects to see her money returned when he sells it. S22, Ep32
A woman wants he ex-fiancé to pay for not only a credit card bill but the fireplace they once used in their shared home. S22, Ep33
Neighbours disagree completely as to the terms of breeding and stud fees after their beloved pets allegedly hook up and start a family. S22, Ep34
Passionate about a land purchase, a man claims the seller profited from his hard labour then sold the property for a huge profit. S22, Ep35
A man says his roommate broke the lock on his door four times; she claims he assaulted her as she tried to climb in a window. S22, Ep36
The Judge is not surprised when a crazy living arrangement does not work out; ex-lovers are left fighting over stolen property and tow fees. S24, Ep169
A man gives his ex-wife a car for his younger daughter; she survives a head-on collision in the vehicle but refuses to give him the insurance payout. S24, Ep170
A woman, not quite ready for a break up, allegedly keys her ex-lover's car and sprays his home with ketchup; anger management classes are required. S24, Ep171
Sisters pull together to pay for their father's funeral only to be pulled apart by life insurance delays; the Judge takes the insurance company to task. S24, Ep172
Hollie Gazzard, a young hairdresser from the UK, was hoping for a fresh start but was tragically killed by her ex, leaving her family and community devastated. S1, Ep4
David Tronnes meets Shanti Cooper online and moves to Orlando, purchasing a house in cash. In 2018, David finds Shanti unresponsive. It is clear this is not an accidental death. S1, Ep3
Patricia Parkin is a new mother on the verge of turning her life around when she disappears on the eve of a record-breaking winter storm in New Jersey in 1995. S3, Ep7
...Accident? The case of Carol Hickok, who was found dead at the foot of a staircase outside her home by her 11-year-old stepson after she failed to wake him up for school. S1, Ep9
Police solve the decades-old cold case of Clare Holman through new advancements in DNA technology. S5, Ep5
In 1976, 19-year-old Janet Stallcup goes missing while on her way to a party. Eight days later, her body is found in her car. S5, Ep6
David Tronnes meets Shanti Cooper online and moves to Orlando, purchasing a house in cash. In 2018, David finds Shanti unresponsive. It is clear this is not an accidental death. S1, Ep3
Patricia Parkin is a new mother on the verge of turning her life around when she disappears on the eve of a record-breaking winter storm in New Jersey in 1995. S3, Ep7
...Accident? The case of Carol Hickok, who was found dead at the foot of a staircase outside her home by her 11-year-old stepson after she failed to wake him up for school. S1, Ep9
A former policeman rescues a pensioner who is trapped up to his neck in a slurry pit. S6, Ep11/20
Helicopter medics land on a football pitch during a game to save the life of a steward. S6, Ep12/20
Two scuba divers describe how they found a Second World War bomb under a pier. S6, Ep13/20
A sea fisherman is washed overboard, and a man retrieves a live grenade from a canal. S6, Ep14/20
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
A 9-year-old's birthday party ends in an alleged assault, bullying accusations and feuding mothers. S22, Ep2
A woman claims she was fired from her job after a good friend accused her of asking for kickbacks from insurance referrals. S22, Ep3
A man who took in his sick sister is surprised when she leaves her entire estate to a cousin; the cousin accuses him of theft. S22, Ep4
All hell breaks loose when a woman asks her mother to take care of her homeless friend's child. S22, Ep5
A woman in search of a rose-themed tattoo claims she sustained an injury and infection at a tattoo parlour and sues for damages. S24, Ep157
Judge Judy refuses to accept a young man's rehearsed answer after he is accused of stealing a friend's motorcycle and wrecking it. S24, Ep158
An unsuspecting, older couple get the shock of their lives when they are pulled over by police for driving an allegedly stolen vehicle. S24, Ep159
A man comes at his friend with a pipe after his motorcycle is allegedly slammed to the ground; his friend returns the violence with a knife. S24, Ep160
A man sues his brother for medical bills and lost wages due to an assault; Judge Judy threatens to throw a man out of court for speaking out of turn. S18, Ep218
A relationship that began on an online forum ends in an alleged assault with accusations of jealousy, cheating, stolen knifes and death threats. S18, Ep219
An 8-year-old takes the stand when he's accused of damaging a passing car; his twin sister tells the judge that she warned him not to do it. S18, Ep220
During a heated argument, a man claims his ex-girlfriend broke his flat screen TV and stole $2,700; he suggests a substance abuse issue was the problem. S22, Ep37
A teenager accused of keying an ex-friend's car shows no fear in the courtroom but is quickly taken down a notch when the Judge responds. S22, Ep38
When allegations of suspicious conduct arise, a man refuses to return his two-year-old daughter to her mother's home. S22, Ep39
A man makes the mistake of adding his lover to the deed on his house; she claims he threatened to kill her. S22, Ep40
An Uber driver claims a mother/daughter duo took a pick axe to her car; the daughter says she was sucker-punched by the driver. S22, Ep41
A woman gets a deal on a paint job then sues the contractor for an allegedly shoddy job, mental anguish and legal fees. S22, Ep42
A motorist is accused of tracking down a biker that annoyed him and tackling him into a moving car. S22, Ep43
A mum stays at home to care for five children all under the age of four; a heated dispute between her husband and his mum makes matters worse. S24, Ep173
When a Slovakian woman's Visa application is denied, she sues small business owners for allegedly scamming her with a thousand-dollar application process. S24, Ep174
A short-lived romance ends with a woman receiving a $2,900 car from her lover the same month she breaks up with him. S24, Ep175
When an electricity bill reaches the thousands, an engaged gay couple take a family member to court; the foreclosed home goes up in smoke. S24, Ep176
Years after David Clarke's death, a confession tape reveals a betrayal between feuding neighbours in the UK. S1, Ep5
Abraham Shakespeare won the lottery in 2006. Dee Dee Moore befriended him, gained control of his assets, and murdered him in 2009. S1, Ep4
During a winter storm in New York, a wife and mother is found brutally murdered in her bedroom. Detectives desperately search outside the home for clues. S3, Ep8
Emile Cilliers tries twice to murder his wife, first with a gas leak, then by sabotaging her parachutes, until her survival exposes the plot. S1, Ep1
